name: 短期收益时序排名
expression: ($close / Ref($close, 1) - 1 - Min($close / Ref($close, 1) - 1, 10)) / (Max($close / Ref($close, 1) - 1, 10) - Min($close / Ref($close, 1) - 1, 10) + 1e-12)

name: 5日收益时序排名
expression: ($close / Ref($close, 5) - 1 - Min($close / Ref($close, 5) - 1, 20)) / (Max($close / Ref($close, 5) - 1, 20) - Min($close / Ref($close, 5) - 1, 20) + 1e-12)
